system.summary: Eat every 5th round or lose 1STR and 2HP / turn.

description.value: The mutant must spend an unusual amount of time eating. It has to carry extra food while traveling, and in combat it must stop every 5th melee turn and spend 1 full turn eating before it can rejoin the fight. If it does not, it loses 1 point of Physical Strength and 2 hit points every melee turn after that. These losses are temporary unless the mutant dies, and they are recovered at the same rate if the mutant takes time out to eat.
